name: ピータさん
description: Petah ($PETAH) is a community-driven meme coin launched on Pump.fun, fully owned and managed by the popular Twitter/X artist @iamkowai (kowai). With over 90,000 followers, @iamkowai has built a dedicated fanbase through his signature hand-drawn artwork that hilariously reimagines Peter Griffin from Family Guy as various iconic anime protagonists and characters. These viral pieces blend Peter Griffin with the dramatic, high-stakes aesthetics of anime series. Examples include Peter as Solo Leveling's Sung Jin-Woo, Jujutsu Kaisen's Yuta Okkotsu, One Piece's Whitebeard, and many more. This crossover style has exploded in popularity, inspiring memes, fan recreations, AI models based on the art style, and has been widely share across platforms like X, Reddit, YouTube, and TikTok. Holders of $PETAH are passionate supporters of @iamkowai's creative work and the ongoing "Petah" meme universe. All trading fees generated by the token are directed back into supporting the project, funding the artist directly, and enabling higher-quality, more ambitious artwork. This creates a sustainable loop where the community's enthusiasm fuels more content, while the art continues to drive interest in the token. As a fair-launched Pump.fun coin, $PETAH emphasizes community ownership and fun, meme-powered growth without presales or insider allocations. It's a tribute to absurd humor, anime culture, and the creative spirit of @iamkowai, turning a simple gag into a thriving, artist-backed ecosystem.
